title: ribotac_v1 — RIBOTAC sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/ribotac_sim.py. One row per RIBOnuclease-TArgeting Chimera: the mass-action ternary-complex occupancy of Target.R.RNase-L and the catalytic multiple-turnover advantage over a stoichiometric RNA binder. RIBOTAC is a SUB-AXIS :> BIFUNCTIONAL (expansion-main, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis; it has a soft cross-dependence ?> RIBOZYME (core, shared multiple-turnover RNA cleavage). In-silico simulator-consistency only; RIBOTAC is research-stage (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

ribotac.description: RIBOTAC identifier within the deterministic panel (or the stoichiometric reference).

drug_precedent.description: Own modality precedent (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

modality_stage.description: Development stage of the modality; RIBOTAC is research-stage (no approved RIBOTAC).

conc_target_nM.description: Assay concentration of the structured RNA target (nM).

conc_ribotac_nM.description: Assay concentration of the bifunctional RIBOTAC molecule (nM).

dot_bracket.description: Vienna dot-bracket secondary structure of the target RNA (parent RIBOZYME-axis Nussinov solver, imported).

num_base_pairs.description: Number of base pairs in the target RNA secondary structure.

pair_density.description: 2*num_base_pairs/length — structuredness proxy for the RNA target.

dot_bracket_balanced.description: True iff the dot-bracket structure is balanced/nested.

structured.description: True iff the RNA target has at least one base pair (RIBOTAC needs a structured target).

k_d1_nM.description: Dissociation constant of the RNA-binding warhead to the RNA target (nM).

k_d2_nM.description: Intrinsic dissociation constant of the recruiter warhead to RNase-L (nM).

alpha.description: Ternary cooperativity factor (>= 1); linker pre-pays the entropy of the second binding event.

binary_fraction.description: Mass-action occupancy of the Target.R binary complex.

rnase_site_fraction.description: Mass-action occupancy of the RNase-L recruiter site, given the binary complex.

ternary_fraction.description: Mass-action fraction of RNA target in the Target.R.RNase ternary complex = binary_fraction*rnase_site_fraction.

k_cat_per_s.description: Recruited-RNase-L catalytic turnover rate for the bound RNA (1/s).

t_exposure_s.description: Exposure window over which turnovers accumulate (s).

turnover_number.description: RNA copies neutralized per molecule = k_cat*t_exposure (1 for the stoichiometric reference).

stoichiometric_turnover.description: Single-turnover reference value (1.0) — a stoichiometric binder neutralizes 1 RNA per molecule.

catalytic_advantage_over_stoichiometric.description: Turnover number divided by the stoichiometric reference (the catalytic advantage).

is_catalytic.description: True iff turnover_number > 1 (a genuine multiple-turnover catalyst).

effective_rna_neutralized_per_molecule.description: Ternary-fraction-weighted RNA copies neutralized per molecule.
